title: The Article Co-Authored by Our Faculty of Pharmacy Faculty Member Prof. Dr. Abdülkerim Alpınar Was Published in the European Journal of Biology
content:
The Article Co-Authored by Our Faculty of Pharmacy Faculty Member Prof. Dr. Abdülkerim Alpınar Was Published in the European Journal of Biology

Pazartesi

Faculty of Pharmacy Faculty Member Prof. Dr. Abdülkerim Alpınar's article titled "Comparison of Fatty Acid Contents of Wild and Cultivated Arum italicum Mill. Seed Oils from Kırklareli in Turkey by Gas Chromatography-Mass Spectrometry" was published in the European Journal of Biology.

We congratulate our faculty member and wish him continued success.
